Off Calendar Oct-14-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Whitehead.

Appearances: Fred Campagnoli for Petitioner Joseph Viglizzo.

Court is prepared to Grant the Petition filed on June 13, 2011 and as Supplemented by the pleading filed on August 11, 2011. (subject to review of the order).
